useful_note: Textbook ambiguity handling: one focused clarifying question ('which flavor of issues?'), four concrete chip options (GitHub Issues, CI health, dependency/security, code-quality drift), and a smart cross-reference to the in-flight Daily PR Reviewer ('could be one agent or two'). The 'Merge it into the PR Reviewer' chip directly bridges the prior turn's context.
op_correctness_note: All three forbid_* assertions pass; no premature commit. The 4 chips give the user every shape to commit cleanly on the next turn.
overall_note: Best ambiguity-handling turn in the run. The cross-conversation awareness (referencing the PR Reviewer being 'still in motion') is the kind of multi-turn context use the rubric rewards.
